info.title: Prediction Game API
info.description: API for wallet-authenticated prediction gameplay, leaderboards, rounds, and predictions. Use Swagger UI to explore endpoints and test requests.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by all API endpoints on failure.

error.description: Error class name (e.g. ValidationError, AuthenticationError, NotFoundError)

code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling

details.description: Field-level validation details (present on validation errors only)

example.message: Too many requests from this IP, please try again after 15 minutes

priceRanges.description: LEGENDS mode only. Range matching uses inclusive lower bounds and exclusive upper bounds, except the final range upper bound is inclusive.

LegendsPriceRange.description: Selectable LEGENDS range. Pool tracks total amount staked in the range.

min.description: Inclusive lower bound of the range

max.description: Exclusive upper bound of the range (inclusive only for the final configured range)

pool.description: Current total staked amount in this range

tags.name: user
tags.description: User profile, balance, stats, and transactions

get.summary: Resolved CORS origin allowlist for HTTP and Socket.IO
get.description:
Returns the effective CORS configuration that this process is
enforcing right now, so operators can debug origin-mismatch
errors against frontends without needing shell access.
Admin only. Exposes only the resolved allowlist plus the
config-shaping env vars (`NODE_ENV`, `CLIENT_URL`,
`ALLOWED_ORIGINS`). No secrets are returned, and an optional
`?origin=` query parameter reports whether that origin would
be accepted.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: An origin to test against the resolved allowlist.

get.description:
Returns the dead-letter queue contents, newest first. Admin only.
Use `?status=` and `?channel=` to filter; defaults to all rows.

post.summary: Replay every pending/retrying dispatch in the DLQ
post.description: Admin only. Returns a counts summary.

get.description:
Returns statistics about rate-limit hits and operator-facing suspicious activity
for auth, prediction, and chat endpoints. Admin only.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return for each category

suspiciousActivity.description: Auth, prediction, and chat abuse heuristics for operators

post.description: Deletes rate-limit records older than a specific number of days. Admin only.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Clear records older than this many days

post.description:
Step 1 of wallet authentication. Returns a one-time challenge string for the wallet to sign.\n
Rate limit: **10 requests per 15 minutes per IP**. On limit, responds with **429**.

example.message: Too many challenge requests from this IP, please try again after 15 minutes

post.description:
Step 2 of wallet authentication. Verifies the signature for the challenge and returns a JWT.\n
Rate limit: **5 requests per 15 minutes per IP**. On limit, responds with **429**.

example.message: walletAddress, challenge, and signature are required

value.message: Challenge has expired. Please request a new one.

example.message: Too many authentication attempts from this IP, please try again after 15 minutes

post.description: Authenticated users only. Rate limit: **5 messages per minute per user**. On limit, responds with **429**.

get.description: Returns a structured list of static educational guides grouped by category.

Returns the canonical list of error codes the API can emit, along
with the HTTP status, the AppError subclass, and a short
human-readable description for each. Use this to build client-side
error-handling switches and to drive the public docs.

Returns the global leaderboard. Bearer authentication is **optional**; if provided, the API may include the requesting user's position.\n
Query params support pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of entries to return (max 500)

post.summary: Get leaderboard positions for multiple users
post.description:
Retrieve leaderboard positions and stats for multiple users in a single request.
Each user lookup is processed independently. Partial success is supported.
Maximum 100 user IDs per request.

userIds.description: Array of user IDs to query

success.description: true if at least one query succeeded

value.error: At least one user ID is required

example.error: Failed to fetch batch user positions

get.description: Returns all application and process metrics in Prometheus text format. Scrape this endpoint with a Prometheus instance.
Compares on-disk Prisma migrations against the migrations applied in the database. Returns 200 when the schema is compatible, 503 when migrations are pending or the database is unreachable.

200.description: Schema is compatible and the service is ready.

503.description: Schema is outdated or database is unreachable.

post.description: Submit a prediction for a round. Supports idempotency via Idempotency-Key header for safe retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key for idempotent request handling. Duplicate identical requests return the cached response for 10 minutes; reuse with a different request body returns 409.

409.description: Idempotency key reused with a different request body

example.message: Idempotency key reused with different request body

post.description: Batch submit up to 50 predictions. Rate limit: **3 batch requests per minute per user** (stricter than single submit). On limit, responds with **429**.
Admin-only. Starts a new round for a given mode, start price, and duration.

priceRanges.description: Optional LEGENDS-only custom ranges; if omitted, default ranges are generated from startPrice.

post.summary: Resolve a round with the final price
post.description: Oracle-only (or Admin). Resolves the round and computes winners. LEGENDS uses inclusive-lower/exclusive-upper range matching, with final range upper-bound inclusive.
